Reviews.Comment: Solara is genuinly goated, it has good function support considering its external, it also has a very solid UI that is extremely usable, unlike the CEO of faking functions and crashing on sUNC xeno, i also like how the dev is honest and doesnt fake functions FUCKYOUFCUKYOUFCKYOIU XENO I HATE YOU, updates are quick, not to mention that this exploit is very trustworthy and has been around for a while,  aight bye acevincente bye thx

Reviews.Author: 2l42sffi2x
Reviews.Comment: A well-rounded and capable executor, as simple as you can make it and as supporting as it can be. Definitely not the best executor, but a standard for what all executors should strive to achieve to be considered good enough for users. That's not supposed to be an insult btw I really think this executor is the best at being the middle-ground.

Categories.Comment: Relatively lacking in SUNC but still very capable of running many scripts as it includes the bare fundamentals and commonly used functions.
Not the most optimized, seems to crash a lot, injection can be slow and wonky.

Feels outdated in a way, it lacks the polished feel of other popular executors, but that's alright. Sort of a personal bias but I've interacted with the guy behind it many times and he seems like a genuinely honest and trustworthy guy compared to all other executor developers.

It's as simple as a modern day executor can get, it gives a sort of feeling like YOU are fully in control and not at the will of incredibly complicated and overbloated UIs. I personally like it but not everyone will.
Uptime is surprisingly good, updates to the UI don't happen often but when they do they are usually really beneficial.
